name: relay-llm-proxy
description: Provider agnostic LLM caching and deduplication proxy for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Copilot Business/Enterprise

scripts.bin:build: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-macos-arm64,node22-macos-x64,node22-linux-x64,node22-linux-arm64,node22-win-x64 --output bin/relay
scripts.bin:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output bin/relay-macos-arm64
scripts.bin:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-linux-x64 --output bin/relay-linux-x64
scripts.bin:win: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-win-x64 --output bin/relay-windows-x64.exe
